steps.title: Find the subject of the blank
steps.content: The verb in the blank belongs to the subject "The trefoil knot and the figure-eight knot." Two nouns joined by "and" form a compound, plural subject. The phrase "each with a crossing number below five" is a parenthetical modifier and does not change the subject.

steps.title: Match a plural, present-tense verb
steps.content: The sentence makes a general, present-tense classification (these knots "are among the simplest"), so we need a plural present-tense verb: "are."

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — was: singular and past tense; fails subject-verb agreement with the plural compound subject. ✗
  • Choice B — are: plural present-tense verb that agrees with the compound subject. ✓
  • Choice C — has been: singular; violates subject-verb agreement with a plural subject. ✗
  • Choice D — is: singular; violates subject-verb agreement with a plural subject. ✗
That matches Choice B — are.
